title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 23 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 23/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-23_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-23-2021-2_img1.png
Tanker: MR & older age Tanker values have firmed. Suezmax Astro Perseus (159,100 DWT, Jan 2004, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 18.50 mil, VV value USD 17.04 mil - DD Due. MR2 Ocean Globe (50,300 DWT, Jan 2007, SLS) sold for USD 10.00 mil, VV value USD 9.83 mil - At Auction, SS/DD due.
